creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to jimmy from comment #8)
> New diff obsoletes others. For the first patch, I was working from an old
> copy of portdir from before I installed poudriere. In the meantime, someone
> had staged the port and removed MANCOMPRESSED.

The patch didn't apply cleanly.  I checked the latest version and nobody staged it; nobody removed MANCOMPRESSED.

see: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/net/wackford-squeers/Makefile?revision=362812&view=markup

So I think there is some confusion somewhere.
